build_commands: CARGO_BUILD_JOBS=1 cargo build -p warp --bin warpctrl --features warp/warp_control_cli
CARGO_BUILD_JOBS=1 cargo build -p warp --bin warp --features warp/warp_control_cli

app_launch.method: GUI launch under DISPLAY=:99 with PATH including /root/.cargo/bin and --api-key "$STAGING_USER_WARP_API_KEY"
app_launch.result: launched successfully after installing missing runtime library libxkbcommon-x11-0

commands.expected_result: Denied before outside-Warp control is enabled; input buffer remains unchanged.
commands.actual_result: Exited 1 with JSON error code local_control_disabled and message "outside-Warp local control credential broker is disabled for this instance"; app input remained empty.

commands.expected_result: Text is staged in the selected input buffer and not submitted to the shell.
commands.actual_result: Exited 0 with JSON containing cursor_offset 41, session_id 177976052228114, and text "printf WARPCTRL_INSERT_SHOULD_NOT_EXECUTE"; UI showed the text staged and no shell output for WARPCTRL_INSERT_SHOULD_NOT_EXECUTE appeared.

commands.expected_result: Selected input buffer is replaced and not submitted to the shell.
commands.actual_result: Exited 0 with JSON containing cursor_offset 40, session_id 177976052228114, and text "echo WARPCTRL_REPLACE_SHOULD_NOT_EXECUTE"; UI showed replaced staged text and no shell output for WARPCTRL_REPLACE_SHOULD_NOT_EXECUTE appeared.

commands.command: target/debug/warpctrl --output-format json input mode set agent
commands.expected_result: Selected input switches to agent mode without submitting staged text.
commands.actual_result: Exited 0 with JSON containing cursor_offset 39 and the existing staged text; UI switched to agent mode with agent UI affordances visible and no command executed.

commands.command: target/debug/warpctrl --output-format json input mode set terminal
commands.expected_result: Selected input switches back to terminal mode without submitting staged text.
commands.actual_result: Exited 0 with JSON containing cursor_offset 39 and the existing staged text; UI switched back to terminal mode and no command executed.

commands.expected_result: Selected input buffer is cleared without command execution.
commands.actual_result: Exited 0 with JSON containing cursor_offset 0 and empty text; UI showed an empty input with Run commands placeholder.

commands.expected_result: Active session/tab cycles to the previous session.
commands.actual_result: Exited 0 with JSON action session.previous, previous_tab_index 1, active_tab_index 0, tab_count 3, window_id 0; UI switched to the previous session.

commands.expected_result: Active session/tab cycles to the next session.
commands.actual_result: Exited 0 with JSON action session.next, previous_tab_index 0, active_tab_index 1, tab_count 3, window_id 0; UI switched to the next session.

commands.expected_result: Most recently closed session is reopened.
commands.actual_result: Exited 0 with JSON action session.reopen_closed, handled true, window_id 0; UI showed the closed session reopened.

non_warpctrl_ui_setup.step: Created second session/tab through the Warp UI
Closed one session/tab through the Warp UI before reopen-closed

blockers_or_notes: Installed libxkbcommon-x11-0 after the first app launch attempt reported the missing libxkbcommon-x11.so.0 runtime library.
warpctrl had to run without custom XDG_* overrides so it used the same default local-control socket/state location as the app.
No input.run invocation was performed; staging commands showed no shell command output from the staged text.

A transient accidental agent invocation occurred during manual focus handling; final recorded command screenshots used external xterm/script-based invocations and the app state was recovered before continuing.
